description: We are looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our team.
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our team. If you have excellent programming skills and a passion for developing applications or improving existing ones, we would like to meet you. As a  Data Scientist, you’ll work closely with our engineers to ensure system consistency and improve user experience. 

Data Scientist roles and responsibilities include: 

  • Develop data science model using various machine learning platform such as Cloudera Data Science Workbench (CDSW), Google AI, Azure ML, IMB Watson, AWS Sagemaker, SAS, R, Python or others. 

  • Follow project timeline to ensure project complete on time and on budget 

  • Develop new product in machine learning area such as demand forecasting, product recommendation or basket analysis and other solution 

  • Improve competencies in machine learning area


PT Metrodata Electronics, Tbk (Digital Solution Provider & Technology Innovator) would like to invite you to be part of the company to develop yourself and your skills. If you are: 

  • Bachelor's Degree Computer Science/Information Technology

  • 2-3 years of experience in Data Modelling/Predictive Modelling and in developing machine learning. 

  • Knows programming language (e.g. R, Python, Scala) 

  • Passion in big data analytics. 

  • A strong mix of mathematical/statistical and programming skills. 

  • Solid analytical and problem-solving skills to create data-driven insights. 

If you meet the requirement we needed, let’s apply for the following open positions. Metrodata not just offer for the job, we offer you for brighter career future.
title: Data Scientist

description: As a Data Scientist you'll be part of a team that is working on cutting edge machine learning models. You will work side by side with Analysts and...
jobDescriptionHtml:
As a Data Scientist you'll be part of a team that is working on cutting edge machine learning models. You will work side by side with Analysts and Machine Learning Engineers and take full ownership of your work - from the initial idea-generation phase to the implementation of the final product. Our ideal candidate is result-focused, innovative, has a solid quantitative background and a good business understanding.

About the role:

  • Working in a multi-disciplined team where you'll take full ownership of turning discoveries and ideas into machine learning models.
  • Prototyping diverse machine learning models, from credit scoring to recommendation engine.
  • Researching & Development on how to improve our models, by using our vast amount and unique set of data.
  • Actively contribute to taking Data Science at Kredivo Group to the next level.

About you:
  • Minimum 2 years of relevant work experience.
  • Graduated from the major of or equivalent experience in a quantitative field (i.e). Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Econometrics, Engineering, Artificial Intelligence).
  • Capable to build robust end-to-end predictive models using the latest Machine Learning techniques and methodologies.
  • Proficiency in Python or R.
  • Exposure to RDBMS (i.e. MySQL, PostgreSQL) and No-SQL platforms (i.e. S3).
  • Excellent English communication skills.

Bonus points (optional) for:
  • Experience with alternate data to evaluate credit risk.
  • Experience in building end-to-end Deep Learning and/or NLP models.

Thank you for your interest in Kredivo. We're thrilled that you'd like to join our company. Unfortunately, days are short and applicants are many, so we won't have time to meet everyone. If you are among qualified candidates, you will receive a call or email from our Talent Acquisition team.

#LI-AL1

title: Data Scientist

description: We are seeking an experienced Data Scientist with a proven track record in creating interactive dashboards and performing advanced analytics
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models to solve business problems and optimize processes.

  • Create dynamic dashboards and visualizations using Power BI and other BI tools to communicate insights effectively.

  • Integrate and analyze data from multiple sources (internal and external) to ensure comprehensive reporting.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams and third-party vendors to deliver project objectives.

  • Work closely with the Sales Director to develop dashboards and reports that support sales operations.

  • Present findings and recommendations to stakeholders in a clear, concise manner.

  • Ensure data integrity, security, and compliance with company standards.


Required Skills & Competencies

  • Technical Expertise: Strong knowledge of SQL, database languages, and data modeling. Proficiency in Power BI, Python/R, and machine learning frameworks. Familiarity with agentic AI concepts and applications.

  • Analytical Skills: Ability to interpret complex datasets and generate actionable insights. Experience in predictive modeling and statistical analysis.

  • Communication & Presentation: Excellent verbal and written communication skills. Ability to present technical findings to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Project Management: Experience working on project-based assignments with external partners.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or related field.

  • Minimum 5+ years of experience in data science roles within FMCG companies.

  • Proven track record of delivering machine learning-driven dashboards and analytics.

jobDescriptionHtml:
We only hire the best. Join our elite consulting team—English fluency is a must to work with global clients and experts.

Datapower is a leading fintech consulting company specializing in personal digital lending, credit risk modeling, fraud detection, and AI-driven operational marketing. We empower Banks, Multi-finance companies, and other financial institutions in Southeast Asia and Africa with innovative AI-driven solutions.

As we expand our presence in Indonesia, we are looking for high-potential consultants with strong capabilities in data analytics, statistics and machine learning to join our expert team.


What You’ll Do

• Work on data-driven fintech consulting projects across credit risk, fraud detection, and marketing analytics

• Build, analyze, and optimize machine learning models for client-specific use cases

• Extract insights from financial, behavioral, and alternative data sources (e.g., SLIK, app data, transactions)

• Support client implementation and documentation of analytical models

• Collaborate with data scientists, business analysts, and industry experts across project phases


Who We’re Looking For

We are seeking top-tier university graduates with outstanding academic performance (GPA ≥ 3.5/4.0).

(Majors: Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, Financial engineering)

Technical Skills:

• Solid understanding of machine learning and statistical algorithms

• Proficient in Python and SQL

• Familiarity with model evaluation, feature engineering, and data visualization

Mindset: Analytical thinker, proactive problem-solver, and collaborative team playerPreferred Qualifications

• Internship or work experience in data science or analytics roles

• Exposure to financial services, fintech, or credit scoring projects

• Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., GCP, AWS) is a plus


If you’re ready to accelerate your career, work with global experts, and create real impact for banks and fintechs across Southeast Asia and Africa, apply now and be part of our journey.

description: Join a dynamic team and shape the future of cutting-edge tech solutions as a Machine Learning Engineer.
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

Become a key member of the technology team at PT. LOTTE INNOVATE INDONESIA' as a full-time Machine Learning Engineer. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and implementing advanced machine learning models and algorithms to drive innovation and solve complex business challenges. The position is based in Cilegon, Banten.

What you'll be doing

  1. Design and develop machine learning models and algorithms to tackle a variety of business problems

  2. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions

  3. Implement and optimise machine learning models, ensuring they are accurate, efficient and scalable

  4. Analyse and interpret complex data sets to extract meaningful insights

  5. Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in machine learning and apply innovative techniques to drive continuous improvement

  6. Document and communicate your work to technical and non-technical stakeholders

  7. Mentor and guide junior team members in machine learning best practices

What we're looking for

  1. Degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning or a related technical field

  2. 5+ years of experience in developing and deploying machine learning models in a production environment

  3. Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch or Keras

  4. Strong understanding of machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing, model selection and evaluation

  5. Experience in deploying and maintaining machine learning models in cloud environments

  6. Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills with a keen eye for detail

  7. Strong communication skills to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams
title: Machine Learning Engineer

description: Develop machine learning and computer vision models, implement algorithms, manage data, and collaborate with computer vision experts.
jobDescriptionHtml:
About Us:
At PT Pro Teknologi Siber, we're at the cutting edge of AI innovation. Our mission is to drive transformative solutions using the power of artificial intelligence to shape the future of computer vision. We believe in fostering a culture of collaboration, learning, and personal growth. Our team thrives on challenging projects that make a real-world impact, and we're excited to expand our AI capabilities with driven, passionate individuals like you.

Role Overview:
We are looking for a Junior AI Engineer to join our dynamic team and contribute to the development of AI models, including computer vision applications. In this role, you’ll assist in designing, implementing, and optimizing AI systems using machine learning and deep learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and object detection frameworks. You'll play a key role in data preprocessing, ensuring data quality and integrity, while also supporting the testing and validation of computer vision models. You will collaborate closely with senior engineers to learn and grow in this rapidly evolving field.

What You'll Do:

  • Develop AI & Computer Vision Models: Assist in the creation and refinement of machine learning and deep learning models, including computer vision applications like image classification, object detection, and image segmentation using frameworks such as TensorFlow, Keras, and PyTorch.

  • Code Implementation: Write clean, efficient, and scalable code in Python, Java, or Scala to implement AI algorithms, particularly for computer vision tasks.

  • Data Management: Support the team in managing, cleaning, and preprocessing image and video data, ensuring high-quality inputs for training and evaluation of computer vision models.

  • Testing & Validation: Help test and validate AI and computer vision systems, ensuring their performance and reliability across a variety of use cases.

  • Continuous Learning: Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI and computer vision, integrating new techniques into your work to improve model performance and innovation.

  • Team Collaboration: Work closely with senior engineers and cross-functional teams, contributing ideas and solutions while also enhancing your own technical skills.

What We're Looking For:

  • Educational Background: A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).

  • Technical Skills: Experience or coursework in machine learning, deep learning, and computer vision, with proficiency in Python, Java, or Scala. Familiarity with frameworks like TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, OpenCV, or similar is a plus.

  • Data Handling: Solid understanding of data preprocessing techniques, especially for image and video data, and familiarity with data augmentation and annotation methods for computer vision tasks.

  • Problem-Solving Mindset: A curious and analytical mindset, eager to tackle complex computer vision problems and innovate.

  • Team Player: Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively within a team and learn from others.

  • Growth-Oriented: Passionate about AI and computer vision, with a desire to continuously develop your technical skills and knowledge.

Why Join Us?

  • Learning & Development: Be part of a culture that encourages continuous learning and professional growth, with access to resources, mentorship, and real-world experience.

  • Impactful Work: Contribute to projects that make a meaningful impact in [industry or field], using AI and computer vision to solve real-world challenges.

  • Collaborative Environment: Work with a passionate team of engineers and AI experts who support each other’s growth and innovation.

  • Innovation at Scale: Engage with some of the most cutting-edge AI technologies and tools to create solutions that will shape the future.

If you're excited about the potential of AI and computer vision and are looking for an opportunity to grow in a supportive, forward-thinking company, we'd love to hear from you!

jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities

  • Lead the research, evaluation, and selection of industrial IoT hardware, including environmental sensors, motion/orientation modules, machine-condition sensors (vibration, pressure, load, strain), electrical measurement devices, GPS/NMEA modules, and PLC-integrated components.

  • Architect and optimize end-to-end IoT system designs, covering edge acquisition, protocol conversion, data pipelines, cloud ingestion, database integration, and application-level interoperability.

  • Integrate, configure, and validate industrial field devices, PLCs, edge gateways, microcontrollers, and single-board computers in production environments.

  • Design and implement communication stacks using Serial/UART, RS485, Modbus TCP/RTU, MQTT, OPC-UA, NMEA sentences, and other industry protocols.

  • Perform advanced diagnostics on hardware, firmware, and connectivity issues, including analyzing signal integrity, protocol mismatches, environmental interference, and long-term data reliability.

  • Conduct system validation activities—latency benchmarks, throughput tests, environmental stress testing, EMI/ESD robustness checks, and operational reliability assessments.

  • Develop and maintain high-quality technical documentation: wiring and installation diagrams, PLC/SCADA mappings, communication flow charts, and device integration guidelines.

  • Define and improve standard operating procedures for installation, calibration, field maintenance, incident response, and reliability monitoring.

  • Monitor device telemetry, health metrics, uptime, and data quality to ensure stable field operations and reliable backend data streams.

  • Collaborate with software, cloud, analytics, and product teams to ensure seamless onboarding of hardware data into dashboards, real-time monitoring systems, and reporting tools.

  • Implement and review device-level security hardening, electrical safety compliance, grounding/earthing approaches, and protective measures for EMI, ESD, and surge events.

  • Lead vendor evaluations, pilot testing, hardware qualification, and component selection for projects moving toward mass deployment.

  • Support project planning with accurate Bill of Materials (BOM), installation procedures, QA/validation test plans, and integration readiness assessments.

  • Provide technical guidance to junior engineers and assist in reviewing their work during deployments and troubleshooting activities.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Mechatronics, Informatics, or a closely related field.

  • 4–6 years of hands-on experience in industrial IoT integration, embedded systems, PLC connectivity, or field device engineering.

  • Strong command of industrial communication protocols, including MQTT, Modbus TCP/RTU, RS485/Serial, OPC-UA, CAN/Modbus gateways, and NMEA data formats.

  • Proven experience integrating a wide range of sensors: vibration/condition monitoring, temperature/humidity, pressure, load cells, IMUs, and electrical measurement modules.

  • Proficiency with microcontrollers (e.g., ESP32, STM32) and single-board computers (e.g., Raspberry Pi, Jetson Nano) for edge processing, protocol bridging, and data acquisition.

  • Solid understanding of electrical engineering fundamentals: grounding, shielding, surge protection, EMI/ESD prevention, power distribution, and industrial safety practices.

  • Hands-on experience using diagnostic and validation tools such as oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, multimeters, current clamps, and serial consoles.

  • Experience conducting onsite deployments, system commissioning, and troubleshooting in industrial or remote environments.

  • Strong analytical, documentation, and communication skills, with the ability to work independently and mentor junior team members.

  • Advantageous: knowledge of cloud IoT platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), Node-RED, Python for data acquisition, or Grafana/InfluxDB for monitoring.

Sensor Categories Covered

  • Environmental: temperature, humidity, gas, light

  • Motion & Orientation: accelerometer, gyroscope, IMU, proximity

  • Mechanical & Condition Monitoring: vibration, pressure, load cells, strain gauges

  • Electrical: voltage, current, power measurement and energy monitoring

  • Location & Navigation: GPS modules, GNSS, NMEA-based receivers
title: Internet of Things (IoT)

description: Maintain our network infrastructure, ensuring reliable and high-quality connectivity across our operational areas
jobDescriptionHtml:
JOB SUMMARY

We are seeking a Network Technician to support and maintain our network infrastructure, ensuring reliable and high-quality connectivity across our operational areas. You will play a key role in installing, configuring, and troubleshooting various network devices—including Radio, BTS, Fiber Optic, WiFi, and CCTV—to ensure stable performance and seamless operations.

JOB DESCRIPTION

1. Install, configure, and maintain network infrastructure, including Radio, BTS, Fiber Optic, WiFi, CCTV, and related devices.

2. Perform network monitoring and troubleshooting to ensure optimal performance, stability, and minimal downtime.

3. Configure backbone distribution networks, including basic routing, switching, and device setup.

4. Conduct fieldwork, such as cable installation, FO splicing/testing, and on-site corrective or preventive maintenance.

5. Document network architecture and assets, and collaborate with internal teams to support network improvements and solutions.

JOB REQUIREMENT

1. Minimum D3/S1 in Informatics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or Telecommunications.

2. At least 1 year of experience as a network technician or related field.

3. Strong understanding of TCP/IP, network devices, and infrastructure such as Radio, BTS, FO, WiFi, and CCTV.

4. Ability to work at heights and willingness to work in shifting schedules.

5. Good analytical, troubleshooting, and documentation skills, with placement in Megamendung, Bogor.

ABOUT COMPANY

EIGER Adventure Land is an ecotourism resort blending natural beauty with engaging activities and thrilling adventures.

Built to international standards, it offers immersive, sustainable experiences that celebrate harmony between generations and nature.

At EIGER Adventure Land, we believe people are the heartbeat of our mission: “To inspire generations through meaningful experiences in nature.” As part of our vision “To be a blessing company in sustainable ecotourism development”, we are building a team that grows together while caring for nature.

description:
1. IT Manufacture
2. System Development
3. Manufacturing Industry
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the job

Company Description

As a long-established Japanese multinational company, PT Mandom Indonesia Tbk has been committed to delivering high-quality health and beauty products to the Indonesian market for over five decades. Since commencing commercial production in 1971, we have grown into one of the country’s leading manufacturers of cosmetics and plastic packaging, operating integrated factories located in MM 2100 Industrial Town, Cibitung.

Our flagship brands, GATSBY, PIXY, and PUCELLE, have become household names, trusted by millions of consumers. Beyond the domestic market, we continue to expand our global footprint through exports to Japan, the UAE, India, Malaysia, Thailand, and several emerging markets across the Middle East, Africa, and Eastern Europe. With a strong Japanese work culture emphasizing discipline, safety, and quality excellence, Mandom Indonesia offers a professional environment where talents can grow within a dynamic FMCG industry landscape.

Role Description

We are seeking a Production Automation & Systems Engineer to join our team on a full-time, on-site basis at our manufacturing facility in Cibitung. This role plays a vital part in supporting our digital transformation initiatives, enhancing production systems, and ensuring seamless integration between technology and factory operations. The selected candidate will be responsible for developing and maintaining digital systems, integrating production equipment with internal platforms, and collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to improve operational efficiency and data accuracy.

Job Details

  • Develop digital systems to support automation of manufacturing and operational processes.

  • Build applications to monitor production data, machine performance, and material movement.

  • Support the development, implementation, and optimization of IoT solutions, including device connectivity, data acquisition, and real-time monitoring to enhance manufacturing efficiency.

  • Collaborate with Production, Engineering, and Logistics teams to understand operational needs and deliver technology-based solutions.

  • Prepare documentation, perform system testing, and ensure continuous system improvement and development.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Informatics Engineering or a related field.

  • 1–3 years of experience in IT system development within a manufacturing environment.

  • Strong understanding of system integration, including ERP, MES, and production process mapping.

  • Hands-on experience in web or application development using PHP/Laravel, Python, SQL, or similar technologies.

  • Knowledge of IoT/PLC integration is a strong advantage.

  • Comfortable working in cross-functional teams, able to communicate directly with non-IT stakeholders to troubleshoot issues or deliver solutions.


Only selected candidates will be noticed shortly.

Placement:

Mandom Indonesia Factory (Kawasan Industri MM2100 Blok PP, Jl. Irian, Jatiwangi, Kec. Cikarang Barat, Kabupaten Bekasi, Jawa Barat 17520)

Notes : Seluruh proses rekrutmen akan dilakukan secara langsung (offline) di lokasi pabrik kami di Cibitung. Proses ini kami lakukan untuk memastikan kesesuaian lingkungan kerja serta kecocokan perilaku dengan konteks operasional dari posisi yang berbasis di pabrik.
title: Production Automation & Systems Engineer

description: Lead and manage the Data Analytics & Insights team, ensuring delivery of accurate, timely, and impactful insights.
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

  • Lead and manage the Data Analytics & Insights team, ensuring delivery of accurate, timely, and impactful insights.

  • Implement GenAI-powered analytics workflows: use LLMs to accelerate reporting, automate narratives, and enhance decision-making.

  • Design and refine prompt engineering frameworks for business intelligence (e.g., translating natural language queries into SQL/insight pipelines).

  • Develop and maintain dashboards, reports, and data visualizations to support business reviews and executive decision-making.

  • Apply advanced analytics and statistical modeling to support strategies in customer acquisition, cross-sell, retention, and win-back programs.

  • Establish and maintain a knowledge library: analytics documentation, prompt templates, data dictionaries, and business process flow.

  • Drive a culture of self-service analytics: enable business users to query and interact with data/insights directly (with GenAI Agentic).

  • Ensure data governance, quality, and compliance in all analytics projects.

  • Deliver insight-driven strategies that go beyond reporting, focusing on tangible impact and customer value.


Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in Informatics, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, or related field.

  • 5+ years proven experience in data analytics, BI, or business insights; with 1+ years managing analytics/insights teams.

  • Strong analytical and statistical ability to translate complex data into actionable insights.

  • Experience in GenAI analytics (e.g., using LLMs for data querying, automated insight generation, narrative analytics).

  • Working knowledge of prompt engineering and logic design for AI-driven insights.

  • Skilled in SQL and data visualization platforms (Power BI, Tableau, Looker, or equivalent).

  • Hands-on experience with data pipelines, ETL/ELT frameworks

  • Advanced spreadsheet and reporting skills (Excel, Google Sheets).

  • Familiarity with Python/R for data analysis.

  • Strong communication, presentation, and storytelling abilities — able to explain data-driven insights to non-technical stakeholders.

  • Strategic mindset: not just producing reports but influencing decisions.

  • Passion for problem solving, data exploration, and AI-driven innovation.
title: Data Analyst Manager (Lippo Mall Head Office)
